name: guru-clarify-requirements
description: Clarify initial requirements, active-task scope changes, or explicit review requests through an evidence-first semantic loop with exact confirmation and typed exits.

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, active package inventory and declared record/check runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated by run-skill-command before every runtime command

entry_preconditions.evidence: one current GitHub issue or side-effect-free proposed draft identity
entry_preconditions.binding: the exact requirements authority reviewed by the AI
entry_preconditions.freshness: target facts and content digest remain unchanged through recording and checking

entry_preconditions.evidence: current guru-context-discovery-1.0 snapshot or explicit missing/stale evidence
entry_preconditions.binding: repository, current/history evidence and load-bearing decisions
entry_preconditions.freshness: current evidence is revalidated before clear; missing evidence returns needs_context

entry_preconditions.evidence: live issue/draft facts plus exact source-action preimage and post-mutation facts when applicable
entry_preconditions.binding: the issue or draft that future intake will read
entry_preconditions.freshness: AI rereads immediately before mutation and checker rereads declared live facts

entry_preconditions.evidence: mode, invocation kind, caller-aware resume target, target/context/scope/action/payload/result digests and active-task bindings
entry_preconditions.binding: one current semantic review round and its validated legal continuation
entry_preconditions.freshness: all identities must still match at typed-exit validation

validators.objective_scope: closed result normalization, derived proposal/action/content/result digests, stdout-only boundary and semantic-shape invariants

published schema, digest recomputation, live source/context/task freshness, exact five-classification confirmation, mechanism disposition isolation, decision-trail linkage, authority-before-context-before-task-update re-entry and typed-exit invariants

external_exits.evidence: zero open questions, passed AI Review Gate, current authority/context, non-empty terminal active-task proposals, exact five-classification confirmation/trail projection, and confirmation-free mechanism dispositions
named load-bearing repository/current/history evidence is missing
source/context binding is stale or an issue/comment/body mutation succeeded
an independent delivery unit has a reviewed side-effect-free new issue draft and any active task preserved its classification trail before fresh re-entry
load-bearing refusal, unobtainable evidence, conflict, or blocked semantic gate

reentry.identity: mode, invocation kind, review target, context, scope proposals, source actions, confirmation, active-task evidence and derived content identity
reentry.freshness: clear/new_task is accepted only while every authority/context/task binding remains current; GitHub authority mutation refreshes context first, context generated_at is not earlier than authority updated_at, task update binds that current digest, and no second context digest change is required
